full_name: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar National Institute of Technology, Jalandhar

facts: NIT Jalandhar (Dr. B.R. Ambedkar National Institute of Technology) is located at G T Road Bye Pass, Jalandhar-144008, Punjab, India.
Near Jalandhar City, Pincode 144011.
Language spoken: Hindi (most used).
Climate: Predominantly winter. Rest of seasons (summer, monsoon, autumn) are split equally.
Jalandhar City Railway Station is approximately 13 km from NIT Jalandhar.
Amritsar Airport is approximately 80 km from NIT Jalandhar.
Jalandhar City Bus Station is approximately 13 km from NIT Jalandhar.
NIT Jalandhar has 8 boys hostels.
BH1: 1st year students, 4 sharing rooms.
BH2: 1st year students, 4 sharing rooms.
BH5: 1st year students, 2 sharing rooms.
BH3: Senior year students, 2 sharing rooms.
BH4: Senior year students, 2 sharing rooms.
BH6: Senior year students, 2 sharing rooms.
BH7: Senior year students, 2 sharing rooms.
MBH (Mega Boys Hostel): Senior year students, 2 sharing rooms.
1st year boys are allotted BH1/BH2 (4-sharing) or BH5 (2-sharing). Senior students get 2-sharing rooms in BH3, BH4, BH6, BH7, or MBH.

mess.assignment: Separate mess allotted for every hostel.

monday.breakfast: Bread (6 pcs) + Jam & Butter, Each/Aloo Paratha + Green Chutney + Milk/Tea + Banana/Egg (1pc)
monday.lunch: Jeera Rice + Dal + Seasonal Veg + Bhujia + Roti + Fryums + Pickle
monday.dinner: Plain Rice + Dal + Roti + Onion + Veg: Veg Korma, Non Veg: Chicken (3 pcs)

tuesday.breakfast: Bread (6 pcs) + Jam & Butter, Each/Plain Paratha + Vegetable + Milk/Tea + Banana/Egg (1pc)
tuesday.lunch: Plain Rice + Sambhar + Kadi Pakoda + Bhujia + Salad
tuesday.snacks: Moong Dal Kachori + Black Chana + Tea
tuesday.dinner: Plain Rice + Dal + Poori + Dum Aloo + Gulab Jamun + Pickle

wednesday.breakfast: Bread (6 pcs) + Jam & Butter, Each/Upma + Coconut Chutney + Milk/Tea + Banana
wednesday.lunch: Plain Rice + Dal Fry + Rajma + Aloo Bhujia (Fry) + Roti + Curd + Pickle
wednesday.dinner: Jeera Rice + Chana Dal + Roti + Onion + Veg: Kadhai Paneer, Non Veg: Chicken (4 pcs)

thursday.breakfast: Bread (6 pcs) + Jam & Butter, Each/Poori + Aloo Tamatar + Milk/Tea + Banana/Egg (1pc)
thursday.lunch: Plain Rice + Dal + Soyabean + Bhujia + Roti + Curd + Pickle
thursday.snacks: Aloo Bread Pakoda (3) + Imly Chutney + Tea
thursday.dinner: Chana Dal Tadka + Matar Masala + Aloo Bhujia + Alt: Rice Kheer/Suji Kheer

friday.breakfast: Bread (6 pcs) + Jam & Butter, Each/Dahi (2 pc) + Vada (2 pc) + Sambhar + Coconut Chutney + Milk/Tea + Banana/Egg (1pc)
friday.lunch: Veg Pulao + Dal Makhani + Seasonal Veg + Roti + Salad + Fryums Papad
friday.dinner: Plain Rice + Roti + Onion + Veg: Pindi Chole, Non Veg: Chicken (4 pcs)

saturday.breakfast: Bread (6 pcs) + Jam & Butter, Each/Sattu Paratha + Vegetable + Milk/Tea + Banana/Egg (1pc)
saturday.lunch: Plain Rice + Roti + Salad + Veg: Paneer Butter Masala, Non Veg: Egg Curry

sunday.lunch: Fried Rice + Chana Dal + Veg: Paneer Chilli, Non Veg: Chicken Chilli (4 pcs)
sunday.dinner: Plain Rice + Roti + Desi Chana Masala + Non Veg + Ice Cream

mess.cuisine: Predominantly North Indian with Punjabi staples (parathas, chole bhature, dal makhani, rajma). Both veg and non-veg options served. Non-veg chicken on Monday, Wednesday, Friday, Sunday. Egg curry on Saturday.

fee_structure.hostel_extra: Rs 3,000 extra for single seater room
fee_structure.note: Economically backward GEN/OBC students must submit family income certificate (issued on or after 1st April of every financial year) before last date of online reporting to avail tuition fee waiver. Otherwise treated as fee defaulter.

facts: WiFi available with 5G connectivity for every network at NIT Jalandhar.
75% attendance is mandatory at NIT Jalandhar.
Odd Semester: Red Bull event in December.
Even Semester: Aramb and Utkarsh in March.
Laundry facilities are available in every hostel.
Department-level elections for CR (Class Representative) and GR (General Representative).
Cricket, Kabaddi, Football, Volleyball, Basketball, Carrom, Chess, Table Tennis, Athletics, and Javelin are available.
Snackers: Open 24 hours.
Yadav Canteen: Open 18 hours.
Rim Jim: Open 16 hours.
Night Canteen: Open 16 hours.
Nescafe: Open 16 hours.
Girls Nescafe: Open 16 hours.
No shops on campus, only canteens.
No shops on NIT Jalandhar campus. Only canteens are available.
Fines imposed for: Damaged items, copying in exams, and fights.
Free/Unpaid for all students at NIT Jalandhar.
Unpaid dispensary located approximately 0.5 km from campus.
Available throughout the day.
Hindi is the most used language in and around NIT Jalandhar.
Predominantly winter climate. Rest of seasons (summer, monsoon, autumn) are split equally.

academics.timetable_source: CSE+DS Section B2, Session 2025-26 Even Semester, Department of Basic Sciences
academics.class_timings: Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM to 4:30 PM
